_comment: Authoritative squire-server model roster. Single source of truth. Read by vllm-switch-web.py to build MODE_UNIT / VALID_MODE / the switch HTML, and served (minus 'unit') at GET :4090/models. Also shipped to clients as the offline fallback at ~/.config/local-llm/server-models.json. Edit here (repo) then redeploy via the installer. Fields per mode: mode (switch id + /switch payload), key (picker number), label (short name), task (one-line role shown in the picker), model_id (the id clients address it by, == vLLM served id / 'active-model' alias), ctx (served context window), max_output (output token cap), max_prompt (copilot prompt-token cap = ctx - max_output - margin), unit (systemd unit, server-only), imagegen_disabled (crush: disable imagegen-mcp for this mode), default (the standing/default mode).
